input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.3.7.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.3.7.2
            TITLE: the practice area will be controlled and may only be used during the scheduled times

            CONTENT:
            rule D.3.7.2: The practice area will be controlled and may only be used during the scheduled times
D.3.7.2 The practice area will be controlled and may only be used during the scheduled times

final_answer: The practice area will be controlled and may only be used during the scheduled times
